prompt: Elegant, subtle motion. The chrome reflected face in the mirror comes gently alive with a soft, lifelike micro-movement — the lips shift and part very slightly, a delicate natural motion — while the face stays a smooth on-model mirror-chrome surface showing only nose, lips and chin. Inside the mirror, BEHIND the face, the dark starry GALAXY stays clearly reflected and visible — deep space with scattered stars and a soft blue nebula glowing behind her. A soft iridescent holographic shimmer glides across the disc with a faint slow rotation of its rainbow sheen. The chrome hand stays steady and the chin stays solid. The camera stays essentially still, only the faintest float.
